name: Greek Chicken and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 large Skinless boneless chicken breast pieces - 3/4 inch
2 each Potato, peeled, cut into 1/4 cubes
3/4 cup Low sodium chicken broth, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Arrange chicken, potatoes, and garlic in a 9 x 13 glass baking dish.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour broth over the ingredients.
5. Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and oregano together.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the chicken and potatoes.
7. Bake until the chicken is cooked through and golden brown, and the potatoes are tender, basting occasionally with pan juices, about 30-35 minutes.
